title: [balls_game_2]
description: [balls_game_2] is a physics-based modpack with magic, engineering, and computers. Collect over 10 blocks! Explore over 2 levels! Get creative trying to craft the Creative Physics Staff!
body:
![balls game 2.... pretty scary, eh?](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/656927b4e51f0c97993893d5e3af43ae88f1e22c.png)

**[balls_game_2]** is a private modpack made for my friends and I.

Built on the same FOSS-first philosophy as its predecessor, it blends tech, magic, and physics-driven mechanics across around 150 carefully selected mods.
                                                                                                                                   
## Major content mods include:
                                      
- **Create** for complex mechanical automation, with addons spanning trains, diesel engines, nuclear reactors, and armed airships.
- **Sable**: fully physics-simulated vehicles with realistic momentum and collision.
- **Ars Nouveau** + **Occultism**: two complementary magic systems for spellcasting, summoning, and ore doubling.
- **Applied Energistics 2** for late-game digital storage and autocrafting.
- **ComputerCraft** for programmable automation and CC-Sable vehicle navigation.
- **Caxton** for custom font support and includes Sodium for performance.

## INFORMATION:

Flags are not needed to get this pack running. However, due to the large amount of mods, I would at least reccomend trying to get it set. [Obydux/Minecraft-startup-flags](https://github.com/Obydux/Minecraft-startup-flags)
